Headline: Vir Singh bibliography
Description: This is a list of works by Indian Punjabi-language writer Bhai Vir Singh (1872–1957). This list includes his poetry, novels, translations, plays, and non-fiction.

Headline: Malaun
Description: Malaun (Bengali: মালাউন) is a Bengali pejorative, derived from the Arabic term "ملعون" (mal'un), meaning "accursed" or "deprived of Allah's Mercy",[1][2][3] directed at Bengali Hindus and Indians by the Bangladeshis and the Bengali Muslims.[4][5][6][7]

Headline: Jach'a Jawira (La Paz-Oruro)
Description: Jach'a Jawira (Aymara jach'a big, great, jawira river,[1] "great river", hispanicized names río Jachcha Jahuira, río Jacha Jahuira Caxata, río Jachcha Jahuira de Caxata) which later is named Q'ara Qullu and Waña Jawira is a Bolivian river in the La Paz Department and in the Oruro Department. Its waters flow towards Uru Uru Lake.

Headline: Le Petit Cirque et autres contes
